Sample Engineer.title: Software Engineer
Sample Engineer.summary: Software Engineer with experience building and shipping production software. Replace this summary with your own, or let the generator tailor it to each job description.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Describe a measurable impact you delivered, with a metric (e.g. cut latency from 3s to 280ms).
Describe a system you built or scaled, naming the key technologies you used.
Describe how you collaborated across teams or improved reliability/quality.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Describe an earlier accomplishment with a concrete outcome.
Describe a technical problem you solved and the result.

projects.name: Sample Project | Python, React, PostgreSQL
bullets: One sentence on what the project does and the impact or scale.
One sentence on the key technical approach or result.
